_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we observed that low doses of JQ1 were also sufficient to cooperate with acute Brd4 depletion to kill most MPNST cells in culture by 6 days
